title: Hopper Trading│漏斗交易
description: Use hoppers for auto trading.│使用漏斗來進行自動交易。
body:
# Function│功能
- When using the hopper in Sneaking, you can open the settings interface to set the item number that will be traded when the hopper is used for hopper trading.│潛行時使用漏斗可開啟設置介面，可設置漏斗進行漏斗交易時會進行交易的項目編號。
- If a villager is directly below a hopper with a set trade item number, the items in the hopper will be used to perform the set trade (if there are enough items available for the current trade). The obtained item will drop at the villager's feet, and the remaining number of trades will be reduced. Each hopper trade has a 1-second cooldown.│如果已設定交易項目編號的漏斗正下方有村民，會消耗漏斗中的物品進行所設定的交易項目（若當前物品足夠進行當前交易），交易得到的物品將會掉在該村民腳下，並減少剩餘可交易次數。每次漏斗交易冷卻1秒。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
